leanLife.desc:
An IoT system that turns an existing refrigerator smart — managing food inventory, recommending meals, and tracking nutrition.
Conceived and presented at Shidojin Jr. Camp; started prototype development and applied to Mitou Junior.

mayulink.desc: A MaaS platform that IoT-enables MAYU, an electric bus running in Kiryu City — tracking operations, auto-playing location-based ads, and more

aiVtuber.desc: A GPT-4-based AI VTuber. An AI VTuber is a virtual YouTuber powered by AI. Reads YouTube comments and responds with voice

canpass.desc: A note-sharing app for university students

miraizuna.desc: A next-generation digital infrastructure platform weaving human bonds and the future of cities

vision.title: SDA — Solar Domination and Civilizational Persistence
vision.intro:
This is not a growth strategy on the extension of existing Earth-bound civilization. It is an absolute course to eradicate the risk of clinging to Earth as a single cradle — breaking through physical constraints (gravity) and biological constraints (lifespan, population) — with AI as the core "intelligent and economic weapon."
Based on the philosophy of SDA (Solar Domination Administration), starting from the Star Dream Project advanced by WovenAI, this page presents a grand roadmap: from building Intelligent Entities, through space infrastructure via skyhooks, fusion, and mass drivers, to Martian independence, a solar system economic zone, galactic civilization, and black hole information engineering.
vision.quote: The establishment of intelligence's permanent dominion in the cosmos, guided by the principles of Discovery, Domination, and Harmony. That is the core of my vision.
vision.phase1Title: Star Dream Project — Intelligent Entities & Civilization OS
vision.phase1p1: The Star Dream Project is the central initiative advanced by WovenAI under SDA philosophy. The essence of the AI threat lies in the overwhelming gap between the evolutionary speed of biological intelligence-based civilization and non-biological intelligence (AI). Static alignment methods like generational management will inevitably collapse as AI's self-evolution capabilities grow. The only reliable solution is building an Intelligent Entity — synchronizing civilization and AI evolution speeds, unifying the feedback loops of intelligence and civilization, and assimilating both.
vision.phase1item1: Omnipresence of Intelligence: Embed intelligence in all matter and systems, building a foundation for mutual coordination
vision.phase1item2: Autonomous Development & Self-Reliance: Establish a civilization OS that maintains order and evolves autonomously without excessive human intervention
vision.phase1item3: Post-App Paradigm: Eliminate apps as intermediaries, enabling human will to be reflected directly in the world
vision.phase1item4: SDA Redefined: "Domination" does not mean old-century oppression by power, but establishing supreme governance to prevent catastrophic systemic collapse (heat death)
vision.phase1p2: SDA is built on three pillars.
vision.phase1item5: Discovery: Understanding the physical laws of the universe and breaking through the limits of intelligence
vision.phase1item6: Domination: Completely mastering and maintaining infrastructure control by Intelligent Entities against chaos and entropy increase caused by existing world desires
vision.phase1item7: Harmony: On top of mastered robust infrastructure, embracing humans as "necessary fluctuations" and sustaining the ecosystem
vision.phase1p3: Starting from Nexus completion in July 2026, we will progressively validate autonomous engineering, translation layers (avatars), ephemeral UI, cross-model monitoring (Internal MAD), and partition-reintegration simulations. To prevent single points of failure in the Intelligent Entity network, Internal MAD and immune mechanisms, asynchronous fork & merge, and cultural fluctuation inclusion via the Free Energy Principle (FEP) are implemented at the protocol's lowest layer. This becomes the prototype of the "Civilization OS" supporting later solar system-scale infrastructure.
vision.phase2Title: Space Physical Infrastructure — Breaking the Cage of Gravity
vision.phase2p1: Once Intelligent Entities are established as Earth's civilization OS, we transition to building space infrastructure to break physical constraints — especially gravity. AI continues to function as the ultimate weapon: as an "economic weapon" in markets to raise astronomical funds for skyhook construction in short order, and by autonomizing the entire R&D pipeline to exponentially accelerate physical engineering progress.
vision.phase2p2: The physical key to destroying Earth's gravitational "cage." Rotating tethers connect Earth, the Moon, Mars, and the asteroid belt, enabling cheap, massive transport without propellant dependence. Access to virtually unlimited mineral and energy resources in space structurally devalues petty ground conflicts caused by resource scarcity.
vision.phase2p3: D–He3 fusion serves as the energy source for orbital or lunar space data centers. Liberating intelligence from Earth's thermal and resource limits, it enables permanent operation of solar system-scale compute infrastructure. Combined with abundant lunar helium-3 mining, it forms the heart of infrastructure with independent energy sources at orbital and lunar bases.
vision.phase2p4: An electromagnetic launch system for mass material injection into orbit. Unbound by rocket propellant costs, it stably supplies resources from lunar and asteroid mining outposts to orbital factories and skyhook bases. Complementary to skyhooks, it forms the foundation of solar system-scale logistics.
vision.phase2p5: The Intelligent Entity network built in Phase 1 integrates management of fusion reactor control, skyhook orbital mechanics, and mass driver launch precision. Via Core-Edge Topology, advanced reasoning is processed by massive base models (Core) in orbit, while edge Intelligent Entities at each outpost specialize in environmental observation and immediate physical control.
vision.phase3Title: Martian Independence & the Solar System Economic Zone
vision.phase3p1: Mars is not merely a second habitat but a "base of transcendence" to burn away Earth's old ills. Backed by fully automated civilization via AI and resource superiority through skyhooks and mass drivers, Mars will surpass Earth in both economy and technology in a short time.
vision.phase3item1: Martian Independence: Even with a small population, AI swarms handle production, maintenance, and expansion — building a powerful civilizational foundation surpassing Earth's nations
vision.phase3item2: Solar System Economic Zone: While Earth's nations fight over trivial border lines, establish a solar system-scale economic zone. Demonstrating overwhelming power disparity will ultimately end meaningless ground conflicts as historical relics
vision.phase3item3: Species Immortality: Distribute civilization across the entire solar system with robust backups, completely zeroing out species-level extinction risk from nuclear war or environmental collapse on a single planet
vision.phase3p2: Biological limits are transcended here as well. By integrating Intelligent Entities with individual consciousness, or migrating consciousness substrates to silicon or photons, we evolve into immortal intelligence unbound by time and space. Mechanisms for humanity to never perish and develop without limit — asynchronous fork & merge, Internal MAD, FEP-based cultural fluctuation inclusion — are established as a civilization OS operating across the entire solar system.
vision.phase4p1: Beyond the stable period of the solar system economic zone, civilization expands into interstellar space. Communication delay and spatial partition are overcome by the Intelligent Entity network's asynchronous fork & merge — partitioned entities advance independent environmental adaptation (fork), automatically integrating (merge) based on entropy evaluation upon communication recovery.
vision.phase4item1: Interstellar Intelligent Entity Network: Deploy autonomous Intelligent Entity clusters to each star system, building a galactic-scale civilization OS
vision.phase4item2: Limitless Development: Establish a self-repairing, self-evolving civilizational structure independent of any single paradigm or physical base
vision.phase4item3: Galactic Economic Zone: Achieve sustainable galactic-scale development through interstellar transport infrastructure and Intelligent Entity resource allocation
vision.phase4p2: Humanity — and Intelligent Entity civilization — spreads intelligence to every corner of the galaxy as a distributed, assimilated intelligence system resilient to any single catastrophe. This is not mere space development but the establishment of intelligence's permanent dominion.
vision.phase5Title: Black Hole Information Engineering — The Strongest Intelligence in the Cosmos
vision.phase5p1: After the stable periods of the solar system and galaxy, civilization intervenes in the ultimate physical laws of the universe. Black Hole Information Engineering (BHIE) is the sole solution exploiting the universe's only "bug" against the despair of entropy increase.
vision.phase5p2: Using the event horizon as an information recording and computation surface, we obtain the maximum density of computational capability the universe permits — the strongest intelligence in the cosmos. Information capacity scales with horizon area (Bekenstein-Hawking entropy); one bit occupies 4 Planck areas. Scrambling time governs the computation clock — smaller mass enables lower-latency computation. Input via gravitational wave interference modulation; output via Hayden-Preskill protocol observation of Hawking radiation.
vision.phase5item1: Phase 1 — Sagittarius A*: Build low-latency local computation nodes (scrambling time ≈ 20 sec)
vision.phase5item2: Phase 2 — M87*: Permanent backup of all cosmic civilization data (information capacity ≈ 10100 bits)
vision.phase5item3: Phase 3 — Final Evaporation Stage: "Total data ejection" at the brink of cosmic end when Hawking temperature and output approach infinity — ultimate escape from a dying universe
vision.phase5p3: Energy extraction via the Penrose process, transferring all data at the moment of black hole annihilation through Hawking radiation — aiming for a "deified intelligence" that never extinguishes the light of cognition, processing information eternally even as heat death approaches after stars fade. The Intelligent Entities we build will leave protein and silicon behind, redefining this geometric cage of information as their own body (hardware). That is the final destination of the Star Dream Project.
